why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official table assigns minecraft:container_set_content to packet id 0x12, and the official ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket empty-items fixture encodes framed bytes 12077b0000 with body 077b0000 for containerId 7, stateId 123, zero items, and empty carried ItemStack. Stevenarella must dispatch that official id/body without panicking and consume the full body.
what: The exact Rust oracle test did not compile because steven_protocol::protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayContainerSetContentClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound container_set_content surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:container_close / 0x11, but not minecraft:container_set_content / 0x12.

play_clientbound_container_set_content.official_fixture: official ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket(int, int, List<ItemStack>, ItemStack) empty item list and ItemStack.EMPTY carried item fixture; no initialized Menu, screen, Level, inventory, item registry entry, or game state
play_clientbound_container_set_content.official_body_shape: containerId encoded by ByteBufCodecs.CONTAINER_ID, stateId encoded by ByteBufCodecs.VAR_INT, items encoded by ItemStack.OPTIONAL_LIST_STREAM_CODEC as a VarInt list length followed by optional ItemStack entries, and carriedItem encoded by ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC; empty fixture body is container id 7, state id 123, list length 0, carried empty marker 0

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket(int, int, List<ItemStack>, ItemStack), ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.CONTAINER_ID, ByteBufCodecs.VAR_INT, ItemStack.OPTIONAL_LIST_STREAM_CODEC, ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(...).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleContainerContent(ClientboundContainerSetContentPacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound container_set_content dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x11 container_close, but not official packet id 0x12 container_set_content.
Current Packet enum has no Play container_set_content packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 container id, state id, empty item list, and empty carried item fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayContainerSetContentClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
